---
title: "Worksheet, Week 1"
author: "Fred Azizi"
date: "2022-08-31"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

**Instructions:**

This is the worksheet for the materials covered in Week 1 of STAT 351. You can go over the questions on your free time. The solution will be provided to you before the start of the discussion class next week. Your work **won't be graded**, the only purpose of this is for you to understand how much you understood the material. 

### Question 1

Briefly describe the difference between descriptive statistics and inferential statistcs.

\vspace{3cm}

### Question 2

A manufacturer of computer chips claims that less than 10% of its products are defective. When 1,000 chips were drawn from a large production, 7.5% were found to be defective. 

1.What is the population of interest? 

2. What is the sample? 

3. What is the parameter?

4. What is the statistic? 

5. Does the value 10% refer to the parameter or to the statistic?

6. Is the value 7.5% a parameter or a statistic?

7. Explain briefly how the statistic can be used to make inferences about the parameter to test the claim.
